  "findings": ["Wrong wirenut size staged for terminations"],
  "actions": ["Replace wirenuts with correctly sized connectors per manufacturer and NEC 110.14(B) before starting work"],
  "rationale": "Using an incorrect wirenut size can lead to poor mechanical and electrical connections, overheating, arcing, or fire. NEC 110.14 requires terminals and splicing devices to be suitable for the conductor material, size, and number. The wrong size is a pre-existing defect (non-compliant) that must be corrected before proceeding.",
  "references": ["NEC 110.14", "NEC 110.14(B)"]
